mapper.select: select k.*, u.name, u.sysname from kanban_task k left join users u on u.id = k.users_pic_id where k.project_seq = #{project_seq} order by k.status, k.position
select p.users_id, u.name, u.sysname from project_members p left join users u on u.id = p.users_id where p.project_seq = #{project_seq}
mapper.insert: insert into kanban_task values(task_seq.nextval, #{project_seq}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{users_pic_id}, #{start_date}, #{due_date}, #{position}, #{users_c_id}, sysdate, null)
mapper.update: update kanban_task set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, priority = #{priority}, users_pic_id = #{users_pic_id}, start_date = #{start_date}, due_date = #{due_date}, updated_at = sysdate where task_seq = #{task_seq}
update kanban_task set status = #{status} where task_seq = #{task_seq}
